expectations.text: Uses $derived() or $derived.by() to compute remaining/incomplete count
Defines or accepts a Snippet type (imports from 'svelte')
Uses onclick handler (not on:click Svelte 4 syntax)
Includes a text input for adding new todos
expectations.evidence: <input id="new-todo" type="text" placeholder="What needs to be done?" bind:value={newText} />

expectations.text: Has a toggle mechanism (checkbox or button) per todo
